discipline: Brackets are detected from the JSONL's stored Floquet multipliers (not re-integrated). Each accepted switched seed is cross-checked by (a) fresh full-period monodromy + Floquet, (b) the Phase 1 Radau independent-closure gate at 1e-6, and (c) the period ratio to the parent ~ k (collapse to parent T is REJECTED). Sub-family walks are short (n_steps_max=20) — confirmation that the seed lives on a family, not isolated.
